user.title: KONTINUUM Setup
user.description: KONTINUUM learns your home's patterns and predicts what happens next. Choose a personality that determines how fast the system learns and acts.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: KONTINUUM includes a brain visualization dashboard. If enabled, it will be auto-installed to /config/www/ and accessible via iframe panel.

init.title: KONTINUUM Settings
init.description: Change personality and enable Cortex for LLM-powered multi-agent decisions.

agent_1.title: Cortex – Agent 1
agent_1.description: Configure the first LLM agent. For Ollama leave API Key empty. Choose a role or create a custom agent.

agent_2.title: Cortex – Agent 2
agent_2.description: Configure the second agent. Different agents discuss and find consensus together.

agent_3.title: Cortex – Agent 3 (final)
agent_3.description: Configure the third and final agent. KONTINUUM (Prefrontal) acts as the leader and makes the final decision.
